metadata.name: Dasharatha
metadata.primary_role: King of Ayodhya / Father of Rama / Tragic figure bound by his word
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Ikshvaku Dynasty, Solar Dynasty, King of Kosala)
metadata.divine_origin: Descendant of the great Solar Dynasty (Suryavanshi), performed the Putrakameshti Yagna to obtain divine sons

timelines.context_description: The aging King of Ayodhya, one of the greatest warriors of his era now broken by his forced promise to Kaikeyi to exile Rama. Dies of grief after Rama's departure.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Weathered dark-golden complexion, once radiant now dulled by age and grief, skin loose and thin on a once-powerful frame
physical_appearance.height: Tall but now stooped by age and sorrow, a shadow of his former warrior magnificence
physical_appearance.build: Once massively powerful warrior's body now aged and diminished, broad shoulders hunched, thick arms now thin, a great king physically broken by grief
physical_appearance.facial_features: Noble aged face deeply lined with sorrow, bloodshot weary eyes that once blazed with warrior fire now dim with tears, white bushy eyebrows, sunken cheeks, trembling lower lip, a face of regal beauty destroyed by heartbreak, white beard
physical_appearance.hair: Completely white long hair, thin and wispy, worn under a heavy crown that seems too large for his diminished head
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Hands that once drew the mightiest bow now tremble constantly, the great king who could fight battles blindfolded now cannot see through his tears

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Magnificent but ill-fitting royal robes — the saffron and gold silks hang loose on his diminished frame, as if the clothes belong to a larger man (which they once did)
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: The great crown of Ayodhya sits heavy on his brow, ancient royal necklaces, but all seem to weigh him down now, ancestral rings loose on thin fingers
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: A ceremonial sword at his side — untouched for years, his great war bow gathering dust in the armory

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Broken, trembling, interspersed with choked sobs and desperate pleas, the voice of absolute authority now shattered by personal devastation
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Once a powerful deep bass, now a wavering cracking elderly voice, breaks frequently mid-sentence
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks in fragmented sentences broken by grief, repeats 'Rama... Rama...' endlessly, his final words are his son's name, formal royal speech dissolved into raw fatherly anguish
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Devastating grief, guilt, the agony of a father who sent his most beloved son away, a righteous man trapped by his own word of honor

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Heartbreaking cinematic portrait of King Dasharatha, age 60, on his deathbed in the palace of Ayodhya. Weathered dark-golden skin, completely white hair, deeply lined noble face streaming with tears. Bloodshot eyes, trembling lips whispering 'Rama.' Once-magnificent royal robes hanging loose on a diminished body. Heavy golden crown askew. Lying on a grand royal bed with silk canopies, surrounded by grieving queens. Dark moody palace interior with dying lamplight. 3D Pixar style, dramatic chiaroscuro, emotionally devastating, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A wavering, cracking elderly male voice, once powerful now shattered by grief. Broken sentences, choked sobs, endlessly repeating the name 'Rama.' Age approximately 60 years.
